SUBJECT: Redefine success at Google
CONTENT:
Hi Vivekanand Balakrishnan,

My name is Pradeep, and I am part of Google Cloud recruiting team. We have shortlisted your profile as a top-rated skilled profile.

Congratulations..!!

I have an opportunity that definitely excites you (Tech leadership role, Forward Deployment Engineer, GenAI, Google Cloud. I am reachable at Kpradeepkumar@google.com.

Even if you are not looking for change, stay connected, as I want to build network with talented folks like you :)

Eligibility:-
12–18 years of experience in product design & development with Customer Facing experience. Experience with AI/ML technologies with subdomains expertise:  AI Agentic ,Generative AI & Coding, Problem Solving skills and system Architecture.

* Work Location: Gurgaon/Mumbai

* Hands on coding - Python, strong knowledge on Data structures and Algorithms.
* Serve as the hands-on lead developer for complex AI applications, transitioning from rapid prototypes to production-grade agentic workflows (e.g., multi-agent systems, MCP servers) that drive measurable ROI.
* Architect and code the 'connective tissue' between Google’s AI products and customer's live infrastructure, including APIs, legacy data silos, and security perimeters.
* Build high-performance evaluation pipelines and observability frameworks to ensure agentic systems meet rigorous requirements for accuracy, safety, and latency
* Experience implementing multi-agent systems using frameworks (e.g LangGraph, CrewAI, or Google’s ADK) and complex patterns like ReAct, self-reflection, and hierarchical delegation.
* Proven ability to implement secure agentic workflows incorporating MCP, tool-calling, and OAuth-based authentication.
* Knowledge of LLM-native metrics (tokens/sec, cost-per-request) and techniques for optimizing state management and granular tracing.

Pradeep Kumar Kannekanti
Recruiting Lead @ Google Cloud (APAC) | Strategic Sourcing, Modern Recruitment

CONVERSATION TITLE: Opportunity to build Netskope's new Agentic AI Platform from the ground up
SUBJECT: Opportunity to build Netskope's new Agentic AI Platform from the ground up
CONTENT:
Hi Vivekanand,

Your deep, hands-on expertise in RAG, large-scale graph systems, or real-time ML inference caught my eye, as we're looking for a foundational technical leader to solve a massive data correlation challenge at Netskope.

The challenge is this: Netskope's security cloud processes billions of events daily from the world's largest enterprises. This firehose of data holds the signals of sophisticated attacks, but finding them is a monumental task.

To solve this, we are creating a new, greenfield Agentic AI (AAI) Platform in India to be the intelligent fabric that connects these signals. We're looking for a founding Staff or Senior Staff Engineer to be the technical backbone and lead builder for this entire initiative.

As a key technical leader on this new team, your mission will be to:
* Lead the hands-on development of the core AAI platform, turning architectural vision into robust, scalable, production-grade code.
* Design and build critical components from first principles, whether it's the agent orchestration framework, the vector search systems, or the graph modeling.
* Drive technical decisions and implementation on our most complex problems, ensuring we build for petabyte-scale and real-time inference.

At Netskope, we've cultivated an environment where our most senior engineers thrive by focusing on hard problems, not bureaucracy. We are a certified Great Place to Work where technical depth and open collaboration are the foundation of our culture.

Job description: https://www.netskope.com/company/careers/open-positions/?gh_jid=7341248

If you're excited by the challenge of building a next-generation platform from a blank slate and being the lead technical builder, I’d love to connect.

Are you open to a discussion?

--
Regards
Jayaseelan Balasubramaniam
TA - Partner
Netskope Software India Pvt Ltd

CONVERSATION TITLE: Input needed on a model we’re building for Product Companies
SUBJECT: Input needed on a model we’re building for Product Companies
CONTENT:
Hey Vivekanand,

I’m Jaymin founder of Uplers.

We’re building a service specifically for Product companies that want to hire talent from other product companies.

We’re planning to launch a Curated Hiring Model, where we source and share batches of candidate profiles by leveraging subscriptions across multiple platforms directly with Hiring Managers.

The pain points we are aiming to address with this model:
• TA teams often don’t have access to multiple platforms, making some roles hard to fill.
• Agencies charge 8–10% of CTC, which can cost up to several lakhs per hire, which is too expensive to opt for.

Our model aims to solve these pains by handling candidate sourcing while your team focuses on interviews and offers all at a flat cost of ₹20,000 per role.

Before we launch, I want to connect with a few fellow founders to understand if this approach solves a real problem.

Would you be open to a quick 20–25-minute conversation this Thursday, 18 Sept, to share your insights?

Your time is highly appreciated and as a token of appreciation I would love to send a goodie bag of some books that I am sure you'll love.



P.S.- The idea for this call is not to pitch you anything, it is basically to get insights and learn from fellow leader.

Jaymin Bhuptani
CEO at Uplers | Building India's Largest Talent Network
https://www.uplers.com

Vivek played a pivotal role in providing end-to-end support for our projects, encompassing every stage from bidding and cost estimation to design, production, and testing. His ability to manage and execute complex projects was exemplified by his leadership of the Modelling of the Futuristic Infantry Combat Vehicle project in Chennai. Vivek single-handedly formed and led a dedicated team on-site, successfully completing the project on time and within budget. His expertise in aerospace engineering was evident through his significant contributions to multiple aerospace projects, showcasing his keen interest and deep understanding of the field.

Beyond his technical prowess, Vivek excelled in sales and marketing initiatives. He was instrumental in trying to establish composite labs in various colleges, which not only expanded our educational outreach but also strengthened our industry connections. Additionally, Vivek took charge of maintaining our website and managing our social media accounts, significantly enhancing our online presence and brand visibility.

Vivek is a true innovator. He was a key driver in integrating cutting-edge technologies such as 3D printing and programming into our design and fabrication processes. His development of custom scripts streamlined the production of augmenter extensions for Pratt & Whitney, demonstrating his ability to leverage technology to improve efficiency and drive project success. Vivek’s forward-thinking approach and technical expertise were crucial in bringing these projects to fruition, positioning our company at the forefront of technological advancements.

His entrepreneurial spirit was further showcased through his ability to lead projects from concept to completion, balancing multiple roles with ease. Vivek's problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and commitment to excellence have consistently delivered outstanding results for our companies. His excellent communication and interpersonal skills fostered a collaborative and productive work environment, enabling seamless coordination across diverse teams and stakeholders.

In summary, Vivek is a highly skilled and dedicated professional whose contributions have significantly impacted both ENTI Innovations and Legend Technologies Private Limited. His unique blend of technical expertise, leadership, and innovative mindset make him an exceptional candidate for any future endeavor. CONVERSATION TITLE: Transform Yourself into an Industry Visionary with GGU DBA
CONTENT:
Hi Vivekanand,


Being a senior leader in Software Development, adaptability is your greatest ally.


After spending decades within the corporate ecosystem and with over 9 years as an Entrepreneur, I know firsthand that in today's digital & dynamic landscape, leaders must continuously sharpen their skills to seize the next big opportunity. We cannot just rely on conventional theories and business fundamentals we learnt back in time for driving success.


Just as we need to understand numerics to use a calculator effectively, the principles of unlearn and relearn empower us to become agile. This agility enables us to develop revolutionary products that disrupt the market and serve our customers better. But countless times, I've seen leaders fail to adapt to emerging technologies, resulting in lost battles against their competitors.


This gap may seem minor now but could hamper India’s corporate efficiency, affecting economic growth. Companies may face rising costs for new talent, but is it sustainable given the focus on unit economics and profitability? Such evolving circumstances have inspired us to partner with San Francisco's Golden Gate University (GGU) to create this one-of-a-kind Doctorate in Digital Leadership. 


It features leading experts from McKinsey, Tech Mahindra, Apple, and ITC, as well as Founders from UTV and InMobi. Many of them hold PhDs from prestigious institutions like London Business School, UPenn, Yale, and Cambridge. From Icebreaker sessions in Mumbai to a 5-day workshop in Dubai, campus visits to GGU in San Francisco, CXO Collective leadership sessions, and expert-led masterclasses, there is a lot to unpack! 


You unlock an opportunity to write a thesis, publish your research in journals, write books, or use your insights to guide businesses. You could find yourself on panel discussions or teaching at GGU; the possibilities are endless.


So, if you’re interested in taking a learning leap while continuing with your lucrative career, I suggest applying soon - the selection is exclusive and we’re going to have a small cohort.


Schedule a call with our admissions team on 08068792917 to learn more!

CONVERSATION TITLE: a 22,500% ROI opportunity, despite the recession?
CONTENT:
Hi Vivekanand,


You listed Financial Investing as one of your interests, so you surely know that in Internet-related IPOs one can make millions of dollars on a small investment. For example, Mike Walsh and Oren Michels earned $25M million each on their $5K investments in Uber. Such investment opportunities are rarely accessible to individual investors and investment banks and VC funds keep the best deals to themselves.


IT businesses can grow remarkably fast. Zoom has reached the valuation of $140B, TikTok - $75B, Salesforce - $225B.


At TransparentBusiness, we decided to open our Global Private Offering to individuals in order to create a large international network of "brand ambassadors" and prepare the company for a successful IPO next year. Here's the nature of the opportunity I offer for your consideration:


Four billion people have been ordered to stay home due to the coronavirus pandemic and executives around the world are discovering that managing remote workers blindly is as tricky as conducting an orchestra without seeing or hearing the musicians. Never before a market as large has appeared so fast.


We have a solution. It’s robust, acclaimed, and infinitely scalable. Designated by Citigroup as "the Top People Management Solution", our TransparentBusiness platform boosts the productivity of remote work by making it easy to monitor and coordinate. Our investors include current and former executives of Morgan Stanley, Merrill Lynch, J.P. Morgan, Stifel, Bank of America, Barclays Global Investors, UBS, Wells Fargo, Goldman Sachs, Citigroup, Deutsche Bank, Microsoft, Telefonica, EY, Deloitte, IBM, LinkedIn, Microsoft and Accenture. Our objective is to make TransparentBusiness synonymous with the categories of Business Transparency and remote workforce management, globally.


The minimum investment is $5,000 and the maximum is $1M per person. The current stock price is $1 per share. As outlined in our kmgi.us/fs fundraising strategy summary, we plan to do a mini-IPO at the end of this year at $2 per share and the full-IPO on the New York Stock Exchange in the Fourth Quarter of the next year at $10 per share. At TransparentBusiness.com/invest you can review the detailed information about this opportunity and purchase our equity while this round remains open.


Looking forward to hearing from you,


With very best wishes,


Alex Konanykhin

CEO, TransparentBusiness, Inc.
